metadata.name: Description Summary
metadata.value: We need... an Utah based Architectural Designer who brings creative vision and technical precision together to support the design and execution of branded spaces, immersive environments, and architectural experiences. Working closely with both our Chief Creative Officer, Design Architect, and other creative and production team members, you’ll contribute to early concept development, mood boards, and storytelling—while also producing accurate drawings, 3D models, and documentation through each project phase. This role is ideal for a designer who’s passionate about the intersection of narrative and form, and eager to grow in both aesthetic exploration and architectural detailing.

metadata.name: We Need
metadata.value:
We Need...
STRUCK is searching for a Utah based Architectural Designer who brings creative vision and technical precision together to support the design and execution of branded spaces, immersive environments, and architectural experiences.

metadata.name: Column 1
metadata.value:
We Need...
The Architectural Designer will work closely with our Chief Creative Officer, Design Architect, and other creative and production team members. You’ll contribute to early concept development, mood boards, and storytelling—while also producing accurate drawings, 3D models, and documentation through each project phase. This role is ideal for a designer who’s passionate about the intersection of narrative and form, and eager to grow in both aesthetic exploration and architectural detailing.

metadata.name: Column 2
metadata.value:
You Have...
Must be located in Utah.
3-7 years of professional experience in architecture, experiential design, or a related field.
Masters or equivalent professional degree in Architecture, Interior Architecture, or a related discipline.
Strong portfolio demonstrating both conceptual design thinking and technical drafting/modeling skills.
Proficiency in design software such as Revit, AutoCAD, Rhino, SketchUp, Bluebeam and Adobe Creative Suite; familiarity with Enscape, Lumion, or similar rendering tools.
Understanding of basic building systems, codes, and construction terminology.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with an eagerness to learn from both creative and technical team members.

metadata.name: Column 3
metadata.value:
You Will...
Develop sketches, mood boards, diagrams, and narratives to shape project vision.
Collaborate with architects and creative leadership to align inspiration with feasibility.
Translate abstract ideas into spatial concepts and immersive branded experiences.
Create drawings, 3D models, renderings, and visual assets across all project phases.
Integrate consultant input and ensure accuracy, quality, and compliance in documentation.
Support presentations, client deliverables, and design reviews.
Conduct research on materials, trends, and building systems.
Participate in site visits, RFIs, and mockups to maintain design intent.

metadata.name: Description Summary
metadata.value: A Senior Brand & Experience Strategist who understands that great strategy starts with people. You are endlessly curious about how businesses grow, how brands earn relevance, and how experiences shape behavior. You connect research, insight, creativity, and business objectives to uncover opportunities that move clients forward.

metadata.name: We Need
metadata.value:
We Need...
STRUCK is searching for a Senior Brand & Experience Strategist who understands that great strategy starts with people. You are endlessly curious about how businesses grow, how brands earn relevance, and how experiences shape behavior. You connect research, insight, creativity, and business objectives to uncover opportunities that move clients forward.

metadata.name: Column 1
metadata.value:
You Are...
Insight-driven. Research isn't a phase—it's how you think. You uncover patterns, identify opportunities, and transform information into actionable strategies that inspire teams and clients alike. This builds on STRUCK's emphasis on insight-led, human-centered strategic thinking.
Human-centered. You naturally balance customer needs, business goals, and brand aspirations to create experiences that matter.
A strategic lead. You confidently own strategy for major client engagements, guide discovery, and help teams navigate complex business challenges while bringing others along in the process.
A facilitator. You know how to bring diverse perspectives together, lead collaborative workshops, and build alignment around opportunities and priorities.
A systems thinker. You connect brand, experience, messaging, positioning, customer journeys, and measurement into cohesive strategic frameworks.
A collaborator. You enjoy working alongside designers, writers, architects, producers, technologists, and client partners, believing the best ideas emerge together.
Curious by nature. You stay informed on emerging technologies, consumer behavior, AI-enabled research, innovation, and cultural shifts because understanding what's next is part of your craft.

metadata.name: Column 2
metadata.value:
You Will...
Lead strategic discovery and research for complex client engagements.
Develop brand positioning, messaging frameworks, audience definitions, customer journeys, and strategic recommendations.
Plan and facilitate client workshops, stakeholder interviews, and collaborative working sessions.
Design and execute primary and secondary research initiatives.
Synthesize qualitative and quantitative research into compelling insights and actionable recommendations.
Develop creative briefs, experience strategies, and strategic frameworks that guide cross-functional teams.
Partner closely with Creative Directors, Client Partners, Designers, Architects, and Producers throughout project lifecycles.
Help shape new business opportunities by contributing strategic thinking during pitches and discovery conversations.
Continue evolving STRUCK's strategy processes, templates, methodologies, and thought leadership.
Identify opportunities to integrate emerging research methods, AI tools, and innovation practices into our strategic work.

metadata.name: Column 3
metadata.value:
You Have...
5+ years of experience in strategy within an agency, consulting, innovation, or brand environment.
Proven experience leading strategy for complex brands and multidisciplinary projects.
Expertise in:
Brand positioning
Messaging architecture
Audience definition
Customer experience strategy
Journey mapping
Workshop facilitation
Insight synthesis
Strategic recommendations
Experience conducting both primary and secondary research using qualitative and quantitative methodologies.
Exceptional presentation, storytelling, and communication skills.
The ability to simplify ambiguity into compelling narratives and actionable plans.
Experience collaborating across creative, digital, experiential, and physical environments.
A strong appreciation for design, storytelling, user experience, and business strategy.

metadata.name: Description Summary
metadata.value: We need a Utah based designer who deeply understands the people they are designing for and thrives in transforming ideas into impactful visual experiences, whether digital, physical, or spatial. You are multifaceted, collaborative, and unlike other problem solvers. Your experience spans everything from websites, brand identities, and physical environments to immersive installations and experiential branding. You put user outcomes at the center of your work and partner in our clients’ success. You are a team player who commits to a cross-discipline way of working, constantly empathizing, iterating, and seeking inspiration in unexpected places.

metadata.name: We Need
metadata.value:
We Need...
We are looking for a Utah based designer who deeply understands the people they are designing for and thrives in transforming ideas into impactful visual experiences, whether digital, physical, or spatial. You are multifaceted, collaborative, and unlike other problem solvers. Your experience spans everything from websites, brand identities, and physical environments to immersive installations and experiential branding. You put user outcomes at the center of your work and partner in our clients’ success. You are a team player who commits to a cross-discipline way of working, constantly empathizing, iterating, and seeking inspiration in unexpected places.

metadata.name: Column 1
metadata.value:
You Have...
Must be located in Utah.
5+ years of visual design experience—Agency Experience Preferred.
An exceptional portfolio demonstrating your knowledge of digital and branding work. 
A required in-depth knowledge of Figma.
Understanding of color, type, composition, and physical space.
Strong experience collaborating with teams in an agency environment.
Highly conceptual thinking paired with outstanding execution skills in both digital and physical environments.
Direct client interaction experience, with the finesse to understand objectives and identify creative solutions.
The ability to clearly articulate your thinking behind creative solutions. You communicate successfully with other team members and during presentations to our clients.
Strong collaboration skills. You understand the importance of working together, with people from different backgrounds and specializations, to solve problems.
Experience in environmental, spatial, or branded experience design is preferred.
Ability to work under tight deadlines in a dynamic, fast-moving environment.

metadata.name: Column 2
metadata.value:
You Will...
Take Initiative: You believe that you can and will come up with creative solutions to big problems, with confidence that all it takes is rolling up your sleeves and diving in.
Practice Radical Collaboration: You know that collaboration is more than conference calls and video chats; it’s discovering our individual passions and fighting to give one another ways to show it. You are a role model for radical collaboration, building trust, respect, and shared ownership across the team.
Design for Branded Experiences: You bring brand stories to life in the built world—whether through signage, installations, environmental graphics, or other immersive design touchpoints that shape how people experience a space.
Build Empathy with Clients and Users: You have the ability to step into other people’s shoes, understand their lives, and solve problems from their perspectives. You believe the people you’re designing for are your roadmap to innovative solutions.
